name: boundary puncture

phase_0.boundary_condition: The intact closed manifold enclosing the bulk volume.

VINIT.justification: Represents the unbroken boundary before any defect or stress is introduced.

TANCH.justification: Defines the closed boundary that contains the entire bulk system.

AFWD.justification: Directs energy and force forward against the boundary surface.

AREV.justification: Reverses the deformation and returns the material to its original state.

CLINK.justification: Sequentially links the newly formed permanent defect into the global manifold structure.

IMSCRIB.justification: The boundary recognizes its own geometric limits and material properties.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the continuous boundary into the open aperture and the continuous rim.

FFUSE.justification: Reunites the open aperture and continuous rim to recover the intact boundary.

EVALT.justification: Affirms the stress is sufficient to cause permanent rupture.

EVALF.justification: Negates rupture and confirms the stress remains within reversible bounds.

ENGAGR.justification: Holds the simultaneous states of plastic yielding and elastic recoil without resolution.

IFIX.justification: Records the puncture as an irreversible topological handle in the manifold.

phase_2.split_input: the continuous boundary surface under critical stress
phase_2.fuse_result: the continuous boundary surface under critical stress

phase_3.void_description: The uninitialized state before the manifold surface is defined or stressed.
phase_3.true_description: The affirmative state where the boundary has ruptured and the defect is fixed.
phase_3.false_description: The negative state where the boundary remains intact and stress is fully reversed.
phase_3.both_description: The paradice state at the exact yield point where yielding and recoiling occur simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the pristine unbroken manifold surface.
Establish the global topological closure enclosing the bulk volume.
The boundary registers its own local curvature and material limits.
Apply localized tensile stress directed against the surface.
Bifurcate the topological state at the stress locus into the open aperture and the continuous rim.
Affirm the stress exceeds the yield strength and enter the rupture branch.
Hold the paradice of simultaneous plastic yielding and elastic recoil at the critical threshold.
Permanently fix the topological defect as an irreversible handle in the manifold.
Chain the fixed defect state to the global boundary topology.
Evaluate the negative branch where stress remains below the yield strength.
Execute elastic recoil and reverse the applied stress deformation.
Reunite the continuous rim and the closed aperture to recover the intact boundary surface.
Reassert the global topological closure of the healed manifold.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The differential geometry engine translating stress tensors into topological operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Flux propagation across the boundary lattice communicating local strain to adjacent nodes.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The homology group storing the persistent topological invariants and defect records.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The causal structure of the bulk spacetime determining the chronological order of stress application.
phase_5.alfs_store: The canonical reference manifold defining the baseline metric and topological genus.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The energy dissipated as heat during plastic deformation and topological reconfiguration.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The intact manifold surface with stored elastic potential energy.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The healed manifold surface with dissipated thermal energy and restored baseline metric.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 because the topological healing perfectly reverses the geometric state and preserves the phase space volume of the manifold.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → ENGAGR → IFIX → CLINK → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → TANCH
-- Class: boundary puncture
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 11)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑠  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑡 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [7] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑡  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑙 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def boundary_puncture_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the pristine unbroken manifold surface.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Establish the global topological closure enclosing the bulk volume.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑡 𐑾)  -- [2] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The boundary registers its own local curvature and material limits.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Apply localized tensile stress directed against the surface.)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (Bifurcate the topological state at the stress locus into the open aperture and the continuous rim.) / FFUSE [11] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm the stress exceeds the yield strength and enter the rupture branch.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the paradice of simultaneous plastic yielding and elastic recoil at the ...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently fix the topological defect as an irreversible handle in the manif...)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the fixed defect state to the global boundary topology.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Evaluate the negative branch where stress remains below the yield strength.)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Execute elastic recoil and reverse the applied stress deformation.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [11]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [11] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reunite the continuous rim and the closed aperture to recover the intact boundary surface.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑙 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Reassert the global topological closure of the healed manifold.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def boundary_puncture_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def boundary_puncture_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem boundary_puncture_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
